reason: This configuration aims to maximize performance by addressing the three most critical dataset biases. We use `weighted_bce` to mitigate the severe taxonomic and class long-tail imbalance (Finding 1 & 2). We employ `mixup` augmentation to synthesize multi-label examples, directly simulating the high density of simultaneous species found in the test soundscapes (Finding 4). Finally, setting the geographic scale to 400km provides an aggressive, yet novel, weighting that focuses the model on the Pantanal region, addressing the geographic domain shift (Finding 5).
